metadata.title: MemWords
metadata.description: Remember every word with SM-2 spaced repetition. Build decks, add cards with images, and review each word right before you forget it.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

api.network: No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
api.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
api.badRequest: Invalid request. Please check your data.
api.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Memorize words with spaced repetition. Open a deck to start a review session.

decks.title: Decks
decks.subtitle: Your vocabulary decks
decks.emptyDescription: Create your first deck to start building your vocabulary.

deck.formHint: Group related words into a themed deck.
deck.name: Name
deck.visibilityHint: Public and unlisted decks can be opened by anyone with the link.
deck.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This removes the deck and its card links. The cards themselves are kept.
deck.cardCount: {count, plural, =0 {No cards} one {# card} other {# cards}}
deck.notFoundDescription: This deck does not exist or is private.
deck.noCardsDescription: Add your first card to this deck.
deck.noTaggedCardsDescription: No cards are tagged "{tag}" in this deck.

card.formHint: The front is the word, the back is its meaning or translation.
card.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter
card.tagsHint: Tags are scoped to this deck only.
card.removeFromDeckConfirm: The card stays in other decks and keeps its progress there.
card.deleteFullyConfirm: This removes the card from all decks and deletes all study progress. This cannot be undone.

study.emptyDescription: This deck has no due or new cards right now. Add cards or come back later.
study.doneDescription: You reviewed {count, plural, one {# card} other {# cards}}. Nice work!

image.dropHint: Drag a photo or click to upload

account.name: Name
account.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

hero.title: Remember every word
hero.subtitle: Turn new words into long-term memory. Build decks, add cards, and let spaced repetition bring each one back right before you forget.

features.title: Everything you need to remember
features.subtitle: Built to make new words stick for good.

srs.title: SM-2 spaced repetition
srs.description: The proven SM-2 algorithm resurfaces each card right before you forget it.

decks.title: Decks & tags
decks.description: Organize words into themed decks and filter by tags scoped to each deck.

images.title: Cards with images
images.description: Attach pictures to both sides — upload straight from your device.

study.title: Focused review
study.description: Due cards first, then new ones. Rate Again / Hard / Good / Easy.

table.title: Words table
table.description: Browse every word with translations hidden behind a blur — reveal on tap.

theme.title: Light & dark theme
theme.description: Switch between light and dark themes anytime.

one.title: Create a deck
one.description: Create a themed deck for the words you want to remember.

two.title: Add cards
two.description: Add words with translations, notes and images.

three.title: Review & repeat
three.description: Spaced repetition brings each card back exactly on time.

cta.title: Ready to remember more?
cta.subtitle: Sign in with Google and create your first deck.
